name: Bran Muffins (Mcdonald's)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the first ingredients through a blender on high speed for 20 seconds.
2. Pour the blended mixture into a bowl and beat in the remaining ingredients at a low speed of the mixer until completely mixed.
3. Cover and refrigerate for 24 hours.
4. Fill greased muffin wells almost full with the batter.
5. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 20 to 25 minutes, or until cracked on top and a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Optionally, add 1 tablespoon of plumped raisins to each well before baking.
